Program at a glance

  • Home
  • Program
  • Program at a glance

IEEE TPS 2025

The 7th IEEE International Conference on Trust, Privacy and Security in Intelligent Systems, and Applications

Nov. 11-14, 2025, Pittsburgh, PA, USA

Co-located with IEEE CIC 2025 and IEEE CogMI 2025

CIC 2025 Program at a glance

Time Zone: GMT+8
Saturday, July 25
8:00-13:00
  • SIGIR Summer School Session I
15:00-18:30
  • SIGIR Summer School Session II
20:00-21:30
  • SIGIR Summer School Session III
Sunday, July 26
8:30-18:30
  • Tutorial Sessions
14:30-16:30
  • DC Student Talk Session I
17:00-19:00
  • DC Student Talk Session II
19:30-21:00
  • DC Student Talk Session III
21:30-23:00
  • Social Event I (Student Event I)

Monday, July 27
7:00-8:00
  • Social Event II (Student Event II)
8:10-8:30
  • Welcome & Conference Opening
8:30-9:30
  • Keynote I (Playback is available after 10:00)
9:40-11:40
  • Full paper sessions (3 parallel: 3*6) + Industrial session I
12:00-14:30
  • Virtual discussion rooms available
14:30-15:30
  • Keynote II (Playback is available after 16:00)
15:40-18:00
  • Full paper sessions (3 parallel: 3*7) + Industrial session II
19:00-20:30
  • Social Event III (Women in IR - Session A)
20:00-22:00
  • Short / Demo / TOIS paper session I
22:00-24:00
  • Full paper sessions (3 parallel: 3*6)

Tuesday, July 28
0:00-6:00
  • Virtual discussion rooms available
8:30-9:30
  • Keynote III (Playback is available after 10:00)
9:40-11:40
  • Full paper sessions (3 parallel: 3*6) + Industrial session III
12:00-14:30
  • Virtual discussion rooms available
14:30-15:30
  • Keynote IV (Playback is available after 16:00)
15:40-17:40
  • Full paper sessions (3 parallel: 3*6) + Industrial session IV
20:00-22:00
  • Short / Demo / TOIS paper session II, Social Event IV (DEI Event)
22:00-24:00
  • Full paper sessions (3 parallel: 3*6)

Wednesday, July 29
0:00-1:30
  • Social Event V (Women in IR - Session B)
0:00-6:00
  • Virtual discussion rooms available
8:30-9:30
  • Keynote V (Playback is available after 10:00)
9:40-11:40
  • Full paper sessions (3 parallel: 3*6) + Industrial session V
12:00-14:30
  • Virtual discussion rooms available
14:30-15:30
  • Keynote VI (Playback is available after 16:00)
15:40-17:40
  • Full paper sessions (3 parallel: 3*6) + Industrial session VI
21:00-24:00
  • Conference Closing & Business Meeting

Thursday, July 30
0:00-6:00
  • Virtual discussion rooms available
8:30-24:00
  • Workshop Sessions

Laboratory of Education and Research on Security Assured Information Systems
